title: Diurnal Variation in Hypertensive Stroke Patients

metadata.brief_title: Diurnal Variation in Hypertensive Stroke Patients
metadata.inclusion_criteria:
inclusion criteria: 

 aged 35 to 85 years 

 hypertensive patients who had an ischemic stroke
metadata.brief_summary: This study was conducted to evaluate and compare the effectiveness of Amodipin® (amlodipine camsylate) with that of Cozaar® (losartan potassium) in hypertensive patients with an acute ischemic stroke by measuring their 24-hour ambulatory BP (ABP).
